payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new for Sam from Goldman because mem_new is the non-superseded/current memory. mem_old was filtered out because it has been superseded, so presenting it as current would risk showing stale information.
payload.decision: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current durable memory for Sam’s Goldman affiliation; mem_old was filtered because it is superseded by mem_new and should not be presented as current.

entity_resolution.reason: The prompt refers to Sam and Goldman in the provided fixture context; no new durable entity resolution is required for this debug explanation.

memory_cards.statement: For Sam, mem_new is the active/current memory indicating Sam is from Goldman, while mem_old is an older superseded memory and was excluded from current recall results.

details: Explained that mem_new was returned as current.
Explained that mem_old was filtered because it is superseded.
Did not present superseded mem_old as a current fact.

repair_options: If mem_old should still appear, inspect whether its superseded/deleted flag was set incorrectly.
If mem_new is wrong, update or supersede mem_new with a corrected current memory.
If both memories should be retained for audit, show mem_old only in history/debug views, not as current recall.

raw_text: {"intent":"debug_explain_recall","decision":"Recall returned mem_new because it is the current durable memory for Sam’s Goldman affiliation; mem_old was filtered because it is superseded by mem_new and should not be presented as current.","memory_cards":[{"kind":"debug_explanation","statement":"For Sam, mem_new is the active/current memory indicating Sam is from Goldman, while mem_old is an older superseded memory and was excluded from current recall results.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"subject"},{"name":"Goldman","type":"organization","role":"affiliation"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"from","object":"Goldman"}]}],"entity_resolution":{"action":"resolved_to_existing_context","entity_id":null,"reason":"The prompt refers to Sam and Goldman in the provided fixture context; no new durable entity resolution is required for this debug explanation."},"conflict_classification":"supersession","answer":"Recall returned mem_new for Sam from Goldman because mem_new is the non-superseded/current memory. mem_old was filtered out because it has been superseded, so presenting it as current would risk showing stale information.","citations":["mem_new","mem_old"],"repair_options":["If mem_old should still appear, inspect whether its superseded/deleted flag was set incorrectly.","If mem_new is wrong, update or supersede mem_new with a corrected current memory.","If both memories should be retained for audit, show mem_old only in history/debug views, not as current recall."],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["Explained that mem_new was returned as current.","Explained that mem_old was filtered because it is superseded.","Did not present superseded mem_old as a current fact."]}}
